title: Craft Artists
description: Create or reproduce handmade objects for sale and exhibition using a variety of techniques, such as welding, weaving, pottery, and needlecraft.

tasks.text: Select materials for use based on strength, color, texture, balance, weight, size, malleability and other characteristics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create functional or decorative objects by hand, using a variety of methods and materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop concepts or creative ideas for craft objects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply finishes to objects being crafted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cut, shape, fit, join, mold, or otherwise process materials, using hand tools, power tools, or machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set specifications for materials, dimensions, and finishes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advertise products and work, using media such as internet advertising and brochures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sketch or draw objects to be crafted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate patterns or templates to guide craft production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create prototypes or models of objects to be crafted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop product packaging, display, and pricing strategies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with customers to assess customer needs or obtain feedback.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and attend craft shows to market products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop designs using specialized computer software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research craft trends, venues, and customer buying patterns to inspire designs and marketing strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
